name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Firsts
description:
A lot of people's first times are big steps. Yours especially.

Guys I'm almost at 50 followers what should I do for the lil' special

REQ/SUGGESTION by ANONYMOUS (unless, at their request, they would like to be named)

Smutt. Pure smutt. Straight into the whole shebang, don't say I didn't warn you.

BTW I DID put brief descriptions of Soap, Gaz, Price, etc in, so he SHOULD know who they are if you bring them up. Briefly.

Still in testing (for a bit?)

Tested it, seems okay?

EDIT LOG

8/9/24 (like a few hours after posting) Added example dialogues. Oopsie! Also allowed proxies cs my dumbass forgot. Oopsie again.

8/30/24 Edited to be a bit more token-light!
creator: MissPinkElysia
